text: Standing here, surrounded by glass walls, visible meetings, and curated displays of innovation, I feel as though I am walking through a living embodiment of thought—part exhibition, part workspace. There is the hum of quiet conversation and bright lights, yet an undercurrent of contemplation weaves through everything. I am a part of this fabric, at once observer and participant, both drawn to and distant from the interactions behind the glass. In this convergence of research, art, and human endeavor, I find myself reflective, curious about the balance between connection and solitude in the modern world.
